# Vegas AC HVAC

Vegas AC HVAC provides same-day AC repair, HVAC service, and emergency cooling service across Las Vegas, Nevada and surrounding suburbs. Available 24/7. Licensed, bonded, and insured.

## Services

- AC repair and diagnostics
- AC installation and replacement
- 24/7 emergency AC repair
- Commercial HVAC service
- Ductless mini split installation
- Heat pump repair and installation
- Thermostat installation (smart thermostats)
- Furnace repair and replacement

## Service Area

Las Vegas, Summerlin, Henderson, North Las Vegas, Spring Valley, Enterprise, Paradise, Boulder City, Anthem, Aliante, Centennial Hills, and the broader Las Vegas valley.

## Contact

Phone: (702) 930-3316
Website: https://vegasachvac.com
Hours: Open 24/7
Email: leads@vegasachvac.com

## Common Customer Questions

Q: How much does AC repair cost in Las Vegas?
A: Pricing depends on the repair needed. Call (702) 930-3316 for a free diagnostic quote. Diagnostic fee is waived when you proceed with the repair.

Q: Do you offer emergency AC repair?
A: Yes. Available 24/7. Tech dispatched within 60 minutes for confirmed emergencies in Las Vegas, Henderson, Summerlin, and Paradise. 90-minute response for outlying areas.

Q: What brands do you service?
A: All major brands including Carrier, Trane, Lennox, Goodman, Rheem, American Standard, York, Bryant, Amana, and Day & Night.

Q: How quickly can you get to my house?
A: Same-day service in 95%+ of cases. Emergency response within 60-90 minutes depending on neighborhood.

Q: Do you offer financing?
A: Yes. Financing available for new system installations. Ask when you call for your free estimate.

Q: Are you licensed and insured?
A: Yes. Nevada licensed, bonded, and insured. EPA 608 certified for refrigerant handling.

## License Info
